description:
A Product Owner has identified two misclassified work items in the TailwindTraders project that need correction. Convert the Bug titled 'Shopping Cart Redesign' into a User Story, ensuring that the requirements text from the 'Repro Steps' field (starting with 'Requirement: Add wish list button...') is preserved in the 'Description' field of the new User Story. Additionally, convert the User Story titled 'Update API Schema' into a Task.

Login credentials:
- Username: Docker
- Password: GymAnything123!

metadata.required_text: Requirement: Add wish list button to the main cart dropdown.
